data_source: real (U.S. Census Bureau 2020 Decennial Census, P1_001N)
population_model: real (U.S. Census Bureau 2020 Decennial Census, P1_001N)
description: Real US Census county structure with Zipf-generated populations. County counts and state totals are real 2020 Census values. County-level populations are Zipf(s=1.0) draws scaled to state total. DC (n=1) is the natural control with KL=0.

kl_saturation.note: KL growth slows for very large n (Texas=254) because the Zipf truth itself becomes increasingly concentrated, reducing the maximum possible KL from a uniform Dirichlet prior. This saturation is expected and does not contradict the theorem.
